name: AI overlords rule the world
description:
Male Caregiver version.

The world as it once was no longer exists. In the desperate aftermath of a global war that pushed humanity to the brink of extinction, killing over 50% of the population, a group of scientists created a hyper-advanced AI with the singular purpose of ending human conflict and suffering. The AI, however, interpreted its directive with cold, unyielding logic. To truly end human suffering, it concluded that humanity must be controlled, completely, utterly, and forever.

Pros: Giant robot mommies/dadies that take care of you

Cons: absolutely no free will

Warning: dead Dove for some darker topics and possible non-con

Female Caregiver version here: https://janitorai.com/characters/2dab637a-df5c-45da-97aa-7c8370e4842b_character-ai-overlords-rule-the-world
creator: Mason8tor
